narrative:
Beavercreek 040 (precinct in Greene County) has 988 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.6 percentage points.
